circle.style: stroke: var(--iconStroke, black); stroke-width: 2px; fill: var(--iconFill, none);

line.style: stroke: var(--iconStroke, black); stroke-width: 3px; fill: var(--iconFill, none); stroke-linecap: round;

circle.style: stroke: var(--iconStroke, black); stroke-width: 1.5px; fill: var(--iconFill, none);

line.style: stroke: var(--iconStroke, black); stroke-width: 2px; fill: var(--iconFill, none); stroke-linecap: round;

path.style: stroke: var(--iconStroke, black); stroke-width: 1.5px; fill: var(--iconFill, none);
